# daytona_admin_users (Data Source)

Lists Daytona users using Daytona admin APIs.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_admin_users" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Daytona users. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) User creation timestamp.
- `email` (String) User email address.
- `id` (String) Daytona user ID.
- `name` (String) User display name.
- `public_keys` (Attributes List) User public SSH keys. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items--public_keys))

<a id="nestedatt--items--public_keys"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items.public_keys`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) Public key value.
- `name` (String) Public key name.
